spec_match.rationale: Perfect comparison grid mapping migration logic for four distinct patterns: toolbars, radio groups, tablists, and listboxes.

interactive.rationale: Exceptional controls. Allows toggling individual tabs to hot-reload active markup attributes, live console outputs, and statistical metric tables.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Strong pedagogical value highlighting 95%+ lines of code reductions.

edge_cases.rationale: Covers both vertical lists and horizontal bars.

references.rationale: The see also section now includes the required chromestatus.com/feature/5637601087193088 reference link.

design_system.rationale: Well-organized tabular columns, clean border metrics, and emerald green save indicators.

summary: The migration-diff is a top-tier educational resource measuring lines of code savings across four widget shapes and now satisfies the required ChromeStatus reference invariant.
